DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
MATTHEW K. HINDMAN FROM ZITRIN & MASTROMONACO LLP, 956-4030, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT VICTORIA NORTHRIDGE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH FIVE DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. THE COURT WILL NOT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE TRUTH OF MATTERS ASSERTED IN DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION THAT CONTRADICT ALLEGATIONS IN COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR # 1558
